data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the requirement.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate whether the 'Service menu displayed on Google' is satisfied lacks concrete evidence. While there are multiple passed steps indicating various aspects of the booking process, none of them provide direct evidence or checks related to the display of the service menu on Google. Therefore, the validation step is blocked as the necessary information to confirm or deny the requirement is not present.
gaps: No evidence confirming the display of the service menu on Google.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for service menu display
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify the service menu is displayed on Google.
